course_title: COMPANION ANIMAL AND EQUINE MEDICINE II
description: Basic concepts of well-animal companion animal and equine health care, nutrition, and reproduction will be presented. Discussion of the etiology, pathophysiology, diagnosis, treatment, and prevention of important internal medicine and reproductive diseases in these species will be emphasized.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Doctor of Veterinary Medicine with third year standing

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Doctor of Veterinary Medicine with third year standing
